message:
test(fp-conformance): extract packet_filter_runs tests (br-frankenpandas-lxhr)

lxhr monolith-split slice #2 this session: extract the 169 packet_filter_runs_* smoke tests from the inline mod tests in fp-conformance/src/lib.rs into a dedicated tests/packet_filter_runs.rs sibling module.

- lib.rs: 27679 -> 25509 lines (-2170 net).
- New file: 2184 lines including the use super::* header + rustdoc.
- Each test calls run_packet_by_id with a specific FP-P2x-XXX id and asserts green — no inner-mod-tests helpers are referenced, so the extraction is mechanical.

rch: cargo check --all-targets clean; cargo clippy --all-targets -D warnings clean.

Cumulative lxhr progress: fp-conformance/src/lib.rs down from 27,938 (session start) to 25,509 lines (-8.7%) across two clean extractions (fuzz_seed_fixtures + packet_filter_runs). lxhr remains in_progress; more extractions possible as tests that don't depend on mod-tests-local helpers are identified.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
